name: Melt Aways
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chocolate and peanut butter in a shallow pan.
2. Put the pan in a preheated 200 oven and melt completely.
3. Cool slightly.
4. Add Rice Krispies and peanuts; mix well.
5. When cool, add marshmallows and mix again.
6. Drop by spoonful onto waxed paper to set.
7. Store in a cookie tin.
